target.title: test(shared): add unit tests for Levenshtein distance algorithm
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The `levenshtein-distance.ts` module provides the classic Levenshtein distance algorithm for string similarity comparison. However, this module lacked unit tests, which could lead to regressions when the function is modified.

## Why This Change Was Made

Add unit tests for `levenshteinDistance` covering identical strings, empty strings, substitutions, insertions, deletions, case sensitivity, and Unicode characters.

## User Impact

Levenshtein distance now has comprehensive test coverage, reducing regression risk.

## Evidence

Direct behavior probe:

```text
$ node --import tsx -e "import('./src/shared/levenshtein-distance.js').then(({levenshteinDistance})=>console.log(JSON.stringify([{a:'kitten',b:'sitting',r:levenshteinDistance('kitten','sitting'),e:3},{a:'',b:'hello',r:levenshteinDistance('','hello'),e:5},{a:'cat',b:'cats',r:levenshteinDistance('cat','cats'),e:1}])))"
[{"a":"kitten","b":"sitting","r":3,"e":3},{"a":"","b":"hello","r":5,"e":5},{"a":"cat","b":"cats","r":1,"e":1}]
```

Targeted test:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/shared/levenshtein-distance.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  11 passed (11)
   Duration  331ms

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 9.58s
```

Formatting:

```text
$ npx oxfmt --check src/shared/levenshtein-distance.ts src/shared/levenshtein-distance.test.ts
Checking formatting...
All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 60ms on 2 files using 8 threads.
```

Whitespace:

```text
$ git diff --check
```

## AI-assisted

Prepared with Codex. I reviewed the change and kept the PR focused on algorithm coverage.
